Set BLE Configuration.enable_ble: Enable BLE scanning with the required ble.enable field.
Set BLE Configuration.enable_with_interval: Enable BLE scanning and set the scan interval.
Set BLE Configuration.enable_with_rssi_filter: Enable BLE scanning with a minimum RSSI filter.
Set BLE Configuration.enable_with_protocols: Enable BLE scanning with protocol-specific filters and service UUID filters.

Start RFID Inventory or BLE scan.Default start (RFID only): Starts RFID inventory with default settings. Since no scanType is provided, it defaults to RFID-only.
Start RFID Inventory or BLE scan.Start with state persistence disabled: Starts inventory with doNotPersistState set to false, allowing the reader to persist the state.
Start RFID Inventory or BLE scan.Start with Impinj Gen2X: Starts RFID inventory with Impinj Gen2X feature enabled.
Start RFID Inventory or BLE scan.Start BLE scan only: Starts BLE scanning only. Requires prior BLE configuration using set_bleConfig.
Start RFID Inventory or BLE scan.Start RFID scan only: Starts RFID inventory explicitly using scanType = ['rfid'].
Start RFID Inventory or BLE scan.Start BLE and RFID scan: Starts both BLE scanning and RFID inventory simultaneously.

Stop RFID Inventory or BLE scan.Stop RFID (default): Stops RFID inventory using the default behaviour when no scanType is provided.
Stop RFID Inventory or BLE scan.Stop BLE only: Stops BLE scanning only. RFID inventory continues.
Stop RFID Inventory or BLE scan.Stop BLE and RFID: Stops both BLE scanning and RFID inventory.

Get rxSawFilter status.Get current status: Retrieves whether the rxSawFilter is currently enabled or disabled.

Enable or disable rxSawFilter.Disable rxSawFilter: Disables the rxSawFilter by setting preSelection to false.
Enable or disable rxSawFilter.Enable rxSawFilter: Enables the rxSawFilter by setting preSelection to true.

Pass-through command.Send mode command to component: Sends a pass-through command to the specified component to control or query its operating mode.
Pass-through command.Send status command to component: Sends a pass-through command to the specified component to request its current status.

Get Cable Loss Compensation.Get cable loss settings: Retrieves the current cable loss compensation values for all antenna ports.

Get Status.REST-aligned status response: Returns reader operational statistics using the REST status response shape inside the MQTT response payload.

Get_Config.REST-aligned configuration: Returns reader configuration using the REST configuration response shape inside the MQTT response payload.

Get Version.REST-aligned version response: Returns reader component version information using the REST version response shape inside the MQTT response payload.

Set the Reader Configuration.set_config_data_mqtt_async: Configures an MQTT data endpoint with async retention and batching options.
Set the Reader Configuration.set_config_data_aws: Configures an AWS IoT MQTT data endpoint with certificate-based security.
Set the Reader Configuration.set_config_data_azure_mqtt: Configures an MQTT data endpoint using the Azure-style MQTT example from the REST reference.
Set the Reader Configuration.set_config_data_clear: Clears all configured data event endpoint connections.
Set the Reader Configuration.set_config_data_httpPost: Configures an HTTP POST data event endpoint.
Set the Reader Configuration.set_config_data_mqtt: Configures a public MQTT data endpoint for tag data publishing.
Set the Reader Configuration.set_config_data_tcp_ip: Configures a TCP/IP server data endpoint.
Set the Reader Configuration.set_config_data_websocket: Configures a WebSocket data event endpoint.
Set the Reader Configuration.set_config_global_batching: Updates global batching settings for data events.
Set the Reader Configuration.set_config_global_retention: Updates global retention settings for retained data events.
Set the Reader Configuration.set_config_management_events: Updates management event, warning, error, and heartbeat settings.
Set the Reader Configuration.set_config_gpio_led: Updates GPIO and LED event-action configuration.

Set-ImportCloudConfigCommand.set_importCloudConfig: Imports control, data, and management cloud endpoint configuration using the REST cloudConfig example.

Set-ImportCloudConfig-Response.Cloud config import success: Returns an empty payload when the cloud endpoint configuration import succeeds.

Set Cable Loss Compensation.Set ports 1 and 2 cable loss: Sets cable length and cable loss per hundred feet for antenna ports 1 and 2.
Set Cable Loss Compensation.Set ports 3 and 4 cable loss: Sets cable length and cable loss per hundred feet for antenna ports 3 and 4.

Get Reader Capabilities Response.Retrieve reader capabilities: Returns the list of supported capabilities on the current reader, including antennas, supported endpoints, network interfaces, and feature flags.

Change Reader Password.Change password for user: Changes the password for the specified user using the current and new password values.

Set Impinj Gen2X Configuration.Enable FastID: Enables the FastID feature on the reader.
Set Impinj Gen2X Configuration.Disable FastID: Disables the FastID feature on the reader.
Set Impinj Gen2X Configuration.Protect tag: Enables tag protection for the specified tag using the provided password.
Set Impinj Gen2X Configuration.Unprotect tag: Disables tag protection for the specified tag.
Set Impinj Gen2X Configuration.Enable protect read: Enables tag visibility protection mode using the provided password.
Set Impinj Gen2X Configuration.Enable TagFocus: Enables TagFocus mode to improve tag read performance.
Set Impinj Gen2X Configuration.Quiet tags: Applies basic quieting to the specified tags to suppress their responses.
Set Impinj Gen2X Configuration.Unquiet tags: Restores the specified tags from quiet state.
Set Impinj Gen2X Configuration.Advanced quiet tags: Applies advanced quieting using preSelect and tagQuietMasks conditions.
Set Impinj Gen2X Configuration.Advanced unquiet tags: Removes advanced quieting and restores tag communication based on defined conditions.

Get Impinj Gen2X Response.Empty configuration: Returns an empty object when no Impinj Gen2X configuration has been set on the reader.
Get Impinj Gen2X Response.FastID configured: Returns the FastID configuration when the FastID feature is enabled.
Get Impinj Gen2X Response.TagFocus configured: Returns the TagFocus configuration when the feature is enabled.

Get App LED Response.Retrieve LED status: Returns the current status of the application LED on the reader.

Get Logs.Retrieve logging configuration: Returns the logging configuration of the reader, including component log levels and radio packet logging status.
